setup_task.sh line 26 creates and names this file
Actual XML data in setup_task.sh contains exactly 5 Analyte elements: WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, PLT
XML data in setup_task.sh has LastName=SMITH, FirstName=JENNIFER; HL7 v2.x format is LastName^FirstName

WBC analyte value in setup_task.sh XML is 7.2 (line 47)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data embedded in setup_task.sh, specifically a Complete Blood Count (CBC) lab result for a fictional patient named SMITH^JENNIFER. The sample XML file (sample_cbc.xml) contains exactly 5 analytes (WBC, RBC, HGB, HCT, PLT) with WBC having a value of 7.2. The task requires transformation from XML to HL7 v2.x ORU^R01 format, which is the standard for unsolicited lab observation results. The transformation must map the 5 analytes to OBX segments and patient/order data to PID/OBR segments within the container directories /opt/mirthdata/xml_in (input) and /opt/mirthdata/hl7_out (output).
